# CANDIDATE: V14E_BEAR_ONLY_OBSERVATION_ACCUMULATION

**Filed:** 2026-05-31
**Filer:** chef-nemotron (free-tier autonomous R&D)
**Type:** watcher_observation_accumulation
**Status:** DRAFT (NEEDS-RATIFICATION per Rule 9)

## Hypothesis

V14E bear-only watcher (V14E_DIRECTION_FILTER="bear" deployed 2026-05-21) accumulates bear signals that demonstrate WR≥55% over N≥100 observations, qualifying for OP-21 promotion to production watcher status.

## Mechanism

1. **Data source:** `automation/state/watcher-observations.jsonl` filtered for `watcher_name="v14_enhanced"` + `direction="bear"` (new field added 2026-05-21)
2. **Weekly accumulation cadence:** Every Friday EOD, query watcher-observations.jsonl for new bear-only observations since last check
3. **WR calculation:** Wins / Total observations where win = premium_exit > premium_entry
4. **OP-21 promotion gate:** N≥100 AND WR≥55% sustained over 4+ consecutive weeks

## Current state (per leaderboard rank 3)

| Metric | Value | Source |
|---|---|---|
| Historical bear obs (pre-filter) | N=241, WR=58.5%, +$1,492 | leaderboard |
| Deduped bear obs (L67) | N=156, WR=55.1%, +$695 | leaderboard |
| High-conf bear sub-tier | N=33, WR=84.8%, +$1,173 | leaderboard |
| VIX_MODERATE (15-20) high-conf | N=8 deduped, WR=87.5% | leaderboard |
| Post-filter bear-only (5/21+) | TBD | requires query |

## Expected accumulation rate

- Current V14E fire rate: ~2-5 signals/day in bear markets
- Bear-only filter reduces to ~50% of total (bull signals excluded)
- Estimated: 10-15 new bear-only obs/week
- Time to N=100: ~7-10 weeks from 2026-05-21 = ~late July 2026

## OP-20 disclosures

1. **Account-size assumption:** N/A — watcher-only, no trade execution
2. **Sample bias:** Historical bear N=241 includes pre-filter data; post-5/21 bear-only data is fresh accumulation
3. **Out-of-sample:** N/A — observation accumulation phase; OP-21 promotion requires 4+ weeks stable WR
4. **Real-fills:** N/A — watcher observes signals, doesn't trade
5. **Failure modes:** 
   - WR drops below 55% as sample grows → gate fails, remain watcher-only
   - Bear market regime ends → fewer signals, longer accumulation timeline
   - VIX regime shift (VIX<15 or VIX>25) may degrade WR
6. **Concentration:** Historical: top-2 dates (5/04 N=8 + 5/15 N=6) = 59.8% of VIX_MODERATE raw P&L — dedup reduces

## Pre-merge gate

- [ ] Query watcher-observations.jsonl for post-5/21 bear-only observations
- [ ] Establish baseline N and WR as of 2026-05-31
- [ ] Set up weekly Friday query task (manual or scheduled)
- [ ] Document WR trajectory weekly in this candidate

## Confidence

6/10 — Accumulation path is clear; WR threshold is the gating factor. Historical data supports 55%+ WR but post-filter data is fresh.

## Pre-existing leaderboard impact

Complements rank 3 (V14E_BEAR_ONLY_GATE) — this candidate tracks the observation accumulation that enables OP-21 promotion. No conflict with other candidates.
